Click Sequence +
Countdown
sequence
www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 25 --

Phase One
• 	Have an educational piece of content that makes a special offer
at the end. (VSL, On Demand Class, Webinar, Etc.)
• 	This can be a discount, an added bonus, a payment plan,
whatever.
• 	Email your list about it twice per day for three days. (Click
sequence framework from last week.)
www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 25 --

Phase One
• 	If they click on the video, don’t send them any more emails
about watching the video.
• 	Instead, move to the next phase. (See if they bought, if not -
countdown sequence)
• 	If they never click on the video (or whatever), put them into a
click sequence for something else.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 25 --

Phase Two
• 	If they do click on the video, some of them might buy as a result
of the offer you make at the end.
• 	Logic dictates that most won’t. (Otherwise you’d have a 51%
conversion rate or better.)
• 	Therefore, we need to put 	only the clickers 	in a follow up
sequence that’s related to the offer.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 25 --

Phase Two
• 	The most effective thing to do is use a deadline-based email
sequence that sends them directly to a sales letter or sales video.
• 	Use scarcity for maximum effect, and reference the deadline in
your emails and on your web pages.
• Scarcity can be around a discount, expiring bonuses, or you can
make the entire offer expire altogether.
• This phase two email sequence is known as a “countdown”
sequence.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 25 --

Day 1 	Day 2 	Day 3 	Click?
No
NEXT
Day 1 	Day 2 	Day 3 	Day 4 Buy
No
Yes
Four Day Deadline	Click Sequence
www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 25 --

Countdown Sequence Timing
• 	Every day except the last day, two emails before noon.
• 	On the last day, SIX emails:
• 	8:00 AM
• 	10:00 AM
• 	12:00 PM
• 	9:00 PM
• 	10:00 PM
• 	11:00 PM
• 	This is NOT set in stone. See example in a minute.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 25 --

Subject: 	Get it opened.
Subj: NAME, FYI!	1
First sentence: 	Scarcity, get the click.
Your big discount on 	thing ends on [DATE]/[TIME].	2
Image: 	Get the click.
3
Reveal Bonus: 	Get the click,
fuel self-interest.
Plus you’re getting a SURPRISE BONUS.	5
Benefits of bonus: 	“Sell” the click,
fuel self interest.
In this new surprise bonus, you’ll get/learn/
discover…
• How to [BENEFIT] without [BAD]
• What NEVER to do when you want to [GOAL]
• Why everything you’ve learned about
[GOAL] is dead wrong, and what you should
do instead.
6
Second CTA: 	“Sell” the click. Get it here, now.	7
Sign off and PS: 	Re-sell the click,
restate scarcity
Enjoy,
Rick James, Esq
P.S.The special discount on[THING] expires on DATE.
And when you get it during this promotion, you’re also
getting [BONUS].
[BONUS] normally sells for XXX but it’s free
for you when you get [THING] today.
8
Copyright Frank Kern, Inc. A California Company
Countdown Email
Go here and get it now.	4
CTA: 	Get the click.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 25 --
